results.raw_output: LocalAI is a free, open-source alternative to OpenAI, acting as a drop-in replacement REST API compatible with OpenAI specifications for local AI inferencing. results.raw_output: Researchers introduce ComFree-Sim, a GPU-parallelized contact physics engine for robotics simulation. It demonstrates near-linear runtime scaling with contact number and achieves 2-3 times higher throughput than MuJoCo Warp in dense scenes. The engine is successfully deployed for real-time control of a LEAP multi-fingered hand.
results.judge_reasoning: Summary accurately reflects key claims (GPU-parallelized, near-linear scaling, comparison to MuJoCo Warp, LEAP hand deployment) without hallucination. It is concise (2 sentences) and leads with the core innovation. Specific details (throughput numbers, LEAP hand) are included. No opinions or speculation are added.
